text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After we win several races, Super Creek begins
receiving various offers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Magazine interviews, advertisements, and even
cameos on TV. Our days are filled to the brim just
trying to stay on top of all the requests, until...
choice_data_list: Looks like things are finally settling down.
Looks like things are finally settling down.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Indeed. We can rest for a bit at last.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
This is the perfect opportunity to go to a hot
spring! What do you say? We can use the coupon
I got at that raffle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, we promised to go on a hot spring trip
once things calmed down.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Our break starts tomorrow, so this is the perfect
opportunity, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the next day, Super Creek and I head to
the hot spring inn.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my, this place is so charming!
choice_data_list:
Apparently, it's famous enough to get featured
in magazines.

Apparently, it's famous enough to get featured
in magazines.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Now I'm even more excited! ♪ Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We enter the inn with high expectations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Phew, that felt great! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Your skin is so smooth now! And you look really
happy too!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm glad to hear it!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Now then, let's head over to your room.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's not every day that we're able to go on a hot
spring trip. You need to relax and enjoy yourself
to the fullest! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Here you go! Say, "Ahh." ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Wasn't that tasty? ♪ Next up is some
wild-vegetable tempura.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Is there anything else you want to eat? Keep the
requests coming! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It looks like your shoulders are all loosened up
now. On to your arms and legs...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Is that enough pressure? I'll massage all the way
to your fingertips! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
After your massage comes the ear cleaning! Come
and rest your head on my lap! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Does that feel good?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so I receive a full-course pampering from
Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... I'm so glad we took this hot spring trip! ♪
choice_data_list: You should rest a bit as well.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I've rested plenty!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Pampering you is how I recharge! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: And it's also my way of saying thank you!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You stuck by my side during the Arima Kinen and
the whole time before that as well, so...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I wanted to show you how grateful I am! ♪
choice_data_list:
If that's the case, then do it to your heart's
content!

If that's the case, then do it to your heart's
content!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You bet I will! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We're back to our usual schedule starting from
tomorrow, but...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Let me spoil you like this from time to time,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Super Creek and I have formed an
unbreakable bond during this time together.
